compiled_state.title: GREEN: Create core wrapper command files (5 key skills) + validation test
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create .claude/commands/ directory and 5 core wrapper .md files (brainstorm, sprint, fix-bug, debug-everything, preplanning). These validate the detection pattern before bulk creation.

Each wrapper follows this template:
```markdown
!`bash -c 'timeout 3 claude plugin list 2>/dev/null | grep -q "digital-service-orchestra" && echo "PLUGIN_DETECTED" || echo "LOCAL_FALLBACK"'`

If the line above shows PLUGIN_DETECTED: Use the Skill tool to invoke /dso:<skill-name> with arguments: $ARGUMENTS

If the line above shows LOCAL_FALLBACK: Read the skill file at plugins/dso/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md and follow its instructions with arguments: $ARGUMENTS
```

Note: timeout gracefully degrades on macOS (if timeout binary missing, bash fails → stderr suppressed by 2>/dev/null → LOCAL_FALLBACK fires). This is intentional — the detection snippet degrades to local fallback on any failure.

Also add test_wrapper_references_correct_skill to test-wrapper-detection.sh — this test verifies a wrapper file references the correct dso: skill name. It must be in this task (not Task 1) because it needs wrapper files to exist.

Remove .test-index RED markers for detection tests.

### File Impact
- .claude/commands/brainstorm.md (create)
- .claude/commands/sprint.md (create)
- .claude/commands/fix-bug.md (create)
- .claude/commands/debug-everything.md (create)
- .claude/commands/preplanning.md (create)
- tests/scripts/test-wrapper-detection.sh (modify: add test_wrapper_references_correct_skill)
- .test-index (modify: remove RED markers)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] 5 core wrapper files exist in .claude/commands/
  Verify: test -f .claude/commands/brainstorm.md && test -f .claude/commands/sprint.md && test -f .claude/commands/fix-bug.md && test -f .claude/commands/debug-everything.md && test -f .claude/commands/preplanning.md
- [ ] Each wrapper contains detection logic with PLUGIN_DETECTED
  Verify: grep -l 'PLUGIN_DETECTED' .claude/commands/brainstorm.md .claude/commands/sprint.md .claude/commands/fix-bug.md .claude/commands/debug-everything.md .claude/commands/preplanning.md | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] Each wrapper references correct skill name
  Verify: for f in brainstorm sprint fix-bug debug-everything preplanning; do grep -q "dso:${f}" ".claude/commands/${f}.md" || exit 1; done
- [ ] test_wrapper_references_correct_skill test exists and passes
  Verify: grep -q 'test_wrapper_references_correct_skill' tests/scripts/test-wrapper-detection.sh
- [ ] .test-index RED markers removed
  Verify: ! grep -q '\[test_detection_finds_installed_plugin\]' .test-index
- [ ] Detection tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-wrapper-detection.sh

comments.body: Fixed: 5 core wrapper commands created with detection logic
comments.author: Test
